title: Three bee.mjs verbs so every surface is reachable without hooks
action: Per D3/D17/D18. Register three verbs following the state.handoff.write precedent (command-registry.mjs:877-905 for the entry shape, a handler in skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, one line in the name-to-handler map at bee.mjs:4992-4994): `state compact-log --event <precompact|resume> --session-id <id> [--json]` (appends via ch-2's appendCompactionRecord, returns the counts), `state compact-capsule --session-id <id>` (renders ch-4's capsule to stdout — until ch-4 lands, wire the handler to the module function and let this cell's test cover only the log and check verbs), and `state compact-check --session-id <id> [--json]` (ch-2's compactCheck; its JSON output includes an anchor_missing check carrying the same command D10's nudge would name). Per 20260712-dispatcher-unify.md: every bare boolean flag must be listed in FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS, and the registry `examples` are executed contract — each example must actually run. THE DISPATCHER SOURCE IS skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, NOT .bee/bin/bee.mjs (D17). Copy both edited files to their .bee/bin/ targets in this cell (D18) BEFORE running verify, because scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs does not cover bee.mjs (see scripts/test_native_probe.mjs:355-357) and 8 suites including scripts/test_conformance.mjs:44 drive the installed .bee/bin/bee.mjs. Author scripts/test_compact_verbs.mjs following the runBee/record conventions at scripts/test_conformance.mjs:44,95-97,51-55, including a negative-control row proving compact-check mutated nothing.

truths: All three verbs appear in `node .bee/bin/bee.mjs --help --json` with parameters, description and runnable examples derived from the registry entry.
Every registry example actually executes successfully.
state compact-check exits non-zero only on a usage error, never on a detected mismatch — a mismatch is reported data, not a failure.
artifacts: Three registry entries, three handlers, three dispatch-map lines, and the refreshed .bee/bin/ copies of bee.mjs and lib/command-registry.mjs
prohibitions: Never edit .bee/bin/bee.mjs as the source — it is a copy_helper byte-copy of the template (onboard_bee.mjs:2616-2621, 3109-3113).
Do not invent a fourth verb for the nudge — D3 scopes the absolute to durable state and rendered orientation, and compact-check already reports anchor_missing.

trace.dropped_reason: Slice 1 re-shaped after validation returned NOT READY (6 blocking findings). Superseded by the D19-D22 shape: hook keeps anchor ownership, per-cell manifest+ledger regen, serial chain, split cells.
